initialOperations.description:
The operations to be executed before the narrative starts.
For the set storage: They will be set only if there are no variables with the same key already.
For the det tempstorage: if there are variables with the same key already, they will be overwritten.

labels.description: The labels to be used in the narrative. They will be added to the system

value.description: Value to be set in the storage

storageType.description: Type of the storage, if it is a flagStorage or a storage.

Type of the storage, if it is a flagStorage or a storage.
If it is a flagStorage, the value will be get with the function
If it is a label, the value will be get with the function
If it is a choice, the value will be get with the function

leftValue.description: Left value of the arithmetic operation

PixiVNJsonConditionalResultToCombine_Sto.description:
This element is used in case a  gives a result that must be combined with another calculated through other .
in case this possibility is not managed, it will be taken into consideration

combine.description: This variable is interpreted differently by Pixi'VN depending on the value

PixiVNJsonLabels.description: Collection of labels to be used in the narrative.

PixiVNJsonLabelStep.description:
Steps of a label.
Order of operations:
1. run all 
2. set , , 
3. open 
4. go to next step if  is true
5. end the label if  is "label_end"

choices.description: Variable used to display a choice menu.

dialogue.description: Variable used to display a dialog.

glueEnabled.description:
This variable is used to add the next dialog text into the current dialog memory.
This value was added to introduce Ink Glue functionality https://github.com/inkle/ink/blob/master/Documentation/WritingWithInk.md#glue

labelToOpen.description: Variable used to open a label.

goNextStep.description: If is true, the next step will be executed automatically.

end.description:
Variable used to end some elements of the narrative.
- game_end: ends the game
- label_end: ends the label

$origin.description: This value is used by the system to know where this operation is from, for example, if is generated from a string operation.

url.description:
The url of the image or video.
If the url is not provided, the url will be set to the alias.

label.description: The label id to be opened.

props.description: The properties to be passed to the label.

oneTime.description: If this is true, the choice can only be made once.

onlyHaveNoChoice.description: If this is true, the choice can see only if there are no other choices. For example, all choices are one-time choices and they are already selected.

autoSelect.description: If this is true and if is the only choice, it will be automatically selected, and call/jump to the label.

label.description: The id of the label to open.

props.description: The properties to be passed to the label. if you don't want to pass a object, but a list of parameters, you can use the  attribute.

params.description:
**It is not recommended to use it, use it only if necessary**. The parameters to be passed to the label. If you want to pass an object, use the  attribute.
"params" attribute will be stored in the temp storage with the key:  + ( - 1).

character.description: The character id that will speak.

initialOperations.description:
The operations to be executed before the narrative starts.
For the set storage: They will be set only if there are no variables with the same key already.
For the det tempstorage: if there are variables with the same key already, they will be overwritten.

labels.description: The labels to be used in the narrative. They will be added to the system
